Español: El libro está sobre la mesa.

Español: La playa está lejos.

Español: El café está junto a la librería.

Ingles: Take a step back.

Ingles: North is upwards.

Español: El sur está hacia abajo.
Ingles: South is downwards.

Ingles: The garden is behind the house.

Ingles: The remote is on the armchair.

Ingles: Keep the money inside the box.

Ingles: Sit beside your brother.

Ingles: The tree is behind the car.

Ingles: The pharmacy is very close.

Ingles: The cat jumped onto the table.

Español: El papel cayó debajo de la mesa.
Ingles: The paper fell under the table.

Ingles: There is water inside the glass.

Ingles: The dog is running outside.

Ingles: The sun hides behind the mountain.
